name: KWG Living Group Holdings Limited
summary: KWG Living Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides various residential and non-residential property management services in the People's Republic of China. The company also offers commercial operational, real estate intermediary, and business services. As of December 31, 2020, it managed 183 residential properties with an aggregate gross floor area (GFA) under management of 29.1 million square meters; and 172 non-residential properties with an aggregate GFA under management of 12.5 million square meters. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Kowloon, Hong Kong.
